title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.400 - Police Officer Robert Stanze Memorial Highway designated for portion of Interstate 44 in St. Louis County
text:
227.400.  Police Officer Robert Stanze Memorial Highway designated for portion of Interstate 44 in St. Louis County. — The portion of Interstate 44 from mile marker 280 to mile marker 282 in St. Louis County shall be designated the "Police Officer Robert Stanze Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid for by private donation.
(L. 2008 S.B. 930 & 947)
